creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 184454
testcase: shar of net-im/qTox

net-im/qTox switched from qmake to cmake. They use CMAKE_AUTOMOC.
moc isn't called, build breaks with missing moc files, or with missing symbols for signals.

On linux cmake calls automoc in such case. FreeBSD only has automoc4, and no automoc5.

See qTox.shar attached.
